items.prompt: rewrites bounded expressions using distribution or factoring and combines like terms correctly
items.expected_evidence: expand or factor simple expressions using distributive structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner rewrites bounded expressions while preserving equivalence.

items.prompt: explains why like terms can be combined and unlike terms cannot, and why distribution preserves expression value
items.expected_evidence: combine like terms while preserving term meaning and coefficient structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the structural basis for combining like terms and distribution.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to distributive_structure_breakdown.
items.expected_evidence: identify common factors or distributed groups in an expression
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer broke distributive structure or equivalence.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, area-structure, and grouped-quantity representations of distributive expressions
items.expected_evidence: connect area or grouped-quantity structure to distributive rewriting
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves distributive structure across representation changes.
